name: python3-sniffio
title: python3-sniffio
summary: detect which async Python library is in use (Python3 version)
description:
detect which async Python library is in use (Python3 version)
Python library that support multiple async packages (like Trio, asyncio,
etc) need to know which is in use. This library provides this information.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sniffio because detect which async Python library is in use (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sniffio as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sniffio with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sniffio --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
